title: ML-KEM Decapsulation Process
description: Complete walkthrough of ML-KEM decapsulation including message recovery, re-encryption verification, and implicit rejection for IND-CCA2 security.
learningObjectives: Understand the complete decapsulation workflow including re-encryption
Implement decompression and message recovery functions
Apply the Fujisaki-Okamoto transform verification step
Understand implicit rejection and its security importance
Handle decapsulation failures securely without timing leaks
